overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage exploring a cozy, rustic witch's cottage with warm candlelight and fireplace illumination. The player character, dressed in a dark blue robe and pointed hat, moves through the living area and kitchen before ascending to an attic bedroom and returning to the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic living room with stone fireplace and tall bookshelves

agents.ego_description: player character in dark blue witch robe and pointed hat stands near the fireplace, then walks toward the bookshelves before moving out of frame

notable_agents.action: standing by the fireplace, then walking toward the bookshelves and exiting the frame

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire inside
wooden staircase leading to upper floor
tall wooden bookshelf filled with books
large patterned rug covering the wooden floor
green glass banker's lamp on side table
upholstered armchair with tufted back
wicker laundry basket
stack of chopped firewood next to fireplace
window with tied-back green curtains showing dark night outside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a cozy, dimly lit living room with a stone fireplace burning on the left and a tall bookshelf against the back wall. The player character, a witch in blue robes, stands near the fireplace before walking toward the shelves. The camera circles around, revealing a green banker's lamp, a comfortable armchair, and a wicker basket in the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen area with wooden counters and copper fixtures

events.description: camera moves from living room past the armchair into the kitchen area

agents.ego_description: camera moves through the kitchen, panning across wooden counters and shelves with cookware

entered.detail: long wooden kitchen counter with drawers
large copper basin sink on the counter
wooden shelves mounted on the wall holding dishes
copper pots and pans stacked on shelves
stack of white ceramic plates and bowls
white ceramic pitcher on upper shelf
large metal cooking pot on the counter

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions into the kitchen area, passing the armchair and green lamp which now appear on the left. The kitchen features wooden counters with a copper sink, wall-mounted shelves holding copper cookware and ceramic dishes, and a large metal cooking pot. The witch character is no longer visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase with wall sconces leading to attic

events.description: camera turns from kitchen toward the wooden staircase and begins ascending
witch character briefly visible in reflection in wall mirror

agents.ego_description: ascending the wooden stairs, passing a framed mirror on the wall

notable_agents.action: briefly visible in mirror reflection while camera ascends the staircase

entered.detail: lit wall sconce with candle providing warm light
rectangular mirror with wooden frame on the wall
wooden coat rack with hanging garments
spider web in the corner of the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera turns from the kitchen and begins ascending a narrow wooden staircase. A wall sconce and framed mirror appear on the left, with the witch character briefly visible in the mirror's reflection. The stairs lead upward toward a cobwebbed corner and the upper floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy attic bedroom with sloped thatched ceiling and dormer windows

events.description: camera enters the upstairs attic bedroom from the staircase landing
camera turns from the bed area toward the wooden desk with an open book

agents.ego_description: exploring the attic bedroom, examining the telescope, bed, and desk with candles

entered.detail: curved wooden dresser with drawers under the window
brass telescope on tripod pointing toward the window
wooden single bed with brown bedding
dormer window with green curtains showing night sky
oval framed painting hanging on the sloped wall
second window with multiple panes on the right wall
wooden writing desk with curved legs
open book lying on the desk
candles providing warm flickering light on the dresser and desk
feather quill and inkwell on the desk

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a cozy attic bedroom with sloped thatched walls and exposed wooden beams. A brass telescope sits near the dormer window, and a single bed is positioned against the right wall. The camera explores the room, showing a wooden dresser with lit candles and a round framed painting, then turns to a writing desk with an open book and quill.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level entrance hall near the wooden door

events.description: camera descends the stairs from the attic back to the lower level
camera moves toward the wooden entrance door

agents.ego_description: descending the stairs and moving toward the entrance door on the lower level

entered.detail: lantern hanging from the ceiling at the stair landing
heavy wooden door with iron hinges at the entrance
stacked wooden crates and boxes near the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera descends the stairs from the attic, passing a hanging lantern at the landing, and returns to the lower level entrance hall. The wooden entrance door comes into view ahead, flanked by wall sconces, while storage crates and the coat rack are visible on the sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a cozy, dimly lit living room and winds through the cottage before returning to the main entrance. It begins by circling a witch in blue robes near a burning stone fireplace and tall bookshelves, passing a green banker's lamp and a wicker basket. As the camera glides forward, the scene shifts into a rustic kitchen filled with copper cookware and wooden counters before turning to ascend a narrow wooden staircase past a framed mirror. The movement then opens into a cozy attic bedroom with sloped thatched walls, exploring a brass telescope and a candlelit dresser before turning toward a writing desk with an open book. Finally, the camera descends the stairs past a hanging lantern to return to the lower level, ending at the wooden entrance door flanked by wall sconces and storage crates.
